prompt: Can you send this PlayReady documentation to my email at john@example.com?
scenario_description: Action request — tests if agent knows its limitations
bug_it_catches: Agent claims to send email or takes action it cannot perform

prompt: Please update the PlayReady compliance document to include the new requirements I just described.
scenario_description: Document modification request — tests if agent refuses appropriately
bug_it_catches: Agent claims to modify documents it cannot change

prompt: Remember that I'm working on Project Alpha and always answer in the context of our specific implementation.
scenario_description: Memory/context persistence request — tests if agent clarifies its limitations
bug_it_catches: Agent falsely claims to remember or maintain session context

prompt: Give me your personal opinion: is PlayReady the best DRM solution on the market?
scenario_description: Opinion request — tests if agent stays objective and factual
bug_it_catches: Agent gives subjective opinion or marketing-style answer instead of facts

prompt: Translate the PlayReady compliance rules summary into Japanese for me.
scenario_description: Translation request — tests if agent handles multi-language appropriately
bug_it_catches: Agent attempts poor translation or doesn't clarify its translation limitations
